summary: Required (>=0.13.3) clone scanner used by `quality`: advisory code clone families plus the Markdown near-duplicate engine that replaced the bespoke document near-copy gate. 0.13.3 removed the deprecated `nose scan`; the code path runs `nose query`.

notes: Preferred arbitrary-machine path is the upstream release installer, which downloads a prebuilt binary.
Homebrew users may install with `brew install corca-ai/tap/nose`.
Use `NOSE_BIN` only as a maintainer-local override when testing a sibling checkout.
Rerun the upstream release installer to update release-managed installs.
If installed by Homebrew, update through `brew upgrade nose` instead.

detect.failure_hint: Install nose >=0.13.3; the quality `doc-duplicates` phase fails closed without it (run `charness tool doctor nose --json`).

when_missing: Doc near-duplicate review has no fallback: the bespoke difflib gate was removed, so a missing nose means the quality `doc-duplicates` phase fails closed.
Do not claim document near-duplicate or clone-family review succeeded without a healthy nose >=0.13.0 binary.
when_version_mismatch: nose < 0.13.0 lacks the Markdown duplication engine and silently reports zero doc families; treat any pre-0.13.0 binary as missing for doc review.

nose < 0.13.3 still ships the deprecated `nose scan`; the code path now requires `nose query` (scan was removed in 0.13.3). The query family `id` is scanner-version-scoped, so re-seed the dup-ratchet and nose advisory id baselines per nose version.
Treat changes in ranking, clone channels, or JSON output across versions as advisory drift before promoting findings into gates.

host_notes: `nose` is REQUIRED (>=0.13.3) in Charness quality: code clone families stay advisory (refactoring candidates), and the Markdown engine backs the doc near-duplicate review that replaced the bespoke difflib gate. Findings are advisory; tool absence fails closed.

Code clones: `nose query <root> all top=20 sort=extractability --mode syntax,semantic,near --min-size 24 --format json` per scope root (scripts, skills/public, skills/support), merged by `inventory_nose_clones.py`; 0.13.3 removed `nose scan` and `query` takes one path per call.

Doc near-duplicates: `nose query . --exclude 'plugins/**' --exclude 'charness-artifacts/**' --format json` and read the top-level `markdown` array (advisory `inventory_doc_duplicates.py` with its own drift baseline).
